title: Fix KpiBar counts: remove list_tasks pagination
description: KpiBar status-chip counts are wrong for projects with >200 issues because useTasks only sees first page. Drop pagination from list_tasks (signature, cursor plumbing, COUNT block, next_cursor) and from frontend (useTasks cursor state, layout Load-more button). Also fix BdAutocomplete and useAllLabels that were silently capped at 200. Plan at ~/.claude/plans/there-is-something-with-quizzical-bubble.md
close_reason: Closed

title: Fix Windows release build: gen-bindings fails with STATUS_ENTRYPOINT_NOT_FOUND
description: Windows release job in CI fails because tauri-action@v0 silently ignores the beforeBuildCommand input (matrix override from PR #12 has no effect), so Tauri runs tauri.conf.json's beforeBuildCommand='bun run build' which includes 'gen-bindings'. The bindings test binary loads against Tauri runtime DLLs and exits 0xc0000139 on Windows runners. Fix: change tauri.conf.json beforeBuildCommand to 'bun run build:no-bindings' (bindings.ts is committed) and remove the unsupported beforeBuildCommand input + matrix entries from release.yml.

title: Immediate workaround: write port file so app can connect now
description:
OpenSpec change: openspec/changes/dolt-port-discovery/
Task 4.1: Write the current bd-managed dolt port to /Users/dean/workspaces/beads-ui/.beads/port so the beads-ui app can connect immediately via the existing server_url() fallback. Remove this file once task 1.2 lands and the port is read from metadata.json dolt_port.

NOTE: dolt-server.port is now written by bd at 56243 — the app's server_url() already reads this as a fallback, so this task may already be resolved. Verify app can switch to beads-ui project before marking done.
close_reason: dolt-server.port written by bd at port 56243, server confirmed running, stale .beads/port removed. App server_url() already reads dolt-server.port as fallback so it will find the correct port.

title: DependencyGraphTab: infinite setState loop — remove useNodesState sync effects
description: useNodesState+useEffect pattern causes Maximum update depth exceeded. fitView triggers onNodesChange which triggers setNodes which recomputes memo which triggers effect again. Fix: remove useNodesState/useEdgesState and the sync effects; pass nodes/edges directly to ReactFlow as controlled props with nodesDraggable={false}.
close_reason: Closed

close_reason: Updated useTauriSync to invalidate ['worker-findings', project] on both targeted tasks_changed events and full task_list_changed events. Verified with bun run typecheck.

title: Fix parse_progress to count only numbered tasks
description: parse_progress in src-tauri/src/commands/openspec.rs counts every '- [' line in tasks.md, but the openspec-beads-import skill and reconcile_tasks_checkboxes both treat only lines matching '- [ ] N.M description' as real tasks. Result: spec progress bar shows inflated total (e.g. 29/40) while beads bar shows the truthful count (e.g. 11/11). Fix: make parse_progress delegate to parse_task_line so both counters share one definition of task.
close_reason: Closed

title: env_fix: parallel-test race on global HOME mutation
description:
Pre-existing flake in src-tauri/src/env_fix.rs::tests::repair_path_is_idempotent_and_nonempty when run in the full `cargo test --lib` suite. Root cause: the sibling test `expand_tilde_resolves_home` mutated process-wide HOME via std::env::set_var, racing with repair_path's shell-spawn (which captures the user's interactive SHELL PATH via Command::new($SHELL).arg('-ilc')...). Cargo's default parallel test runner caused the two repair_path() calls inside the idempotence test to occasionally see different HOMEs, producing different shell-rc PATH merges and an order drift between first and second calls.

Fix: refactored expand_tilde to use a private expand_tilde_with_home(raw, home) helper. Tests now pass an injected home explicitly and never mutate the process env. Added a third test covering the None-home fallback. Confirmed by 5 consecutive runs of `cargo test --lib` — 61/61 green each time.
close_reason: Closed

- port_not_configured: 'No Dolt port configured — start the server with bd dolt-start'
- server_not_running:<port>: 'Dolt server not running on port <port> — run bd dolt-start'
- connection_failed:<reason>: 'Cannot connect to Dolt: <reason>'

Acceptance: Each error variant shows the correct message. Validation: openspec validate dolt-port-discovery

notes: Error handler found at: src/components/layout/ProjectSwitcher.tsx:71-78 in component ProjectSwitcher (switchProject function). Current error display: catch block at line 71-78 sets connectError state (string), which renders as a red tooltip div (lines 112-116) below the project switcher button. Error message: typeof e === 'string' ? e : 'Failed to connect to project'. The addProject function (line 92-94) has a simpler catch that only logs to console with no user-visible error. AppInit.tsx (line 17-19) silently clears the stored project with no error shown.
close_reason: Located connectProject error handler at src/components/layout/ProjectSwitcher.tsx:71-78. switchProject catch block sets connectError state shown as red tooltip. addProject catch only logs to console. AppInit.tsx silently clears project on failure. Notes added to issue.

title: Keyboard a11y check: focus-triggered tooltips on key areas
description:
OpenSpec change: openspec/changes/app-tooltip-system/

Task 8.6: Keyboard accessibility check: Tab through RefreshButton, FilterBar group menu, and a ChangeCard action — confirm tooltip appears on focus.

Steps:
1. Tab to RefreshButton → tooltip visible
2. Tab through FilterBar → each icon button shows tooltip on focus
3. Tab to a ChangeCard action button → tooltip on focus
4. Press Escape → tooltip dismisses without losing focus

Acceptance: All three areas show tooltips on keyboard focus per spec scenario 'Tooltip appears on keyboard focus'.
Validation: Manual test with bun run dev
close_reason: Closed

title: Verify tooltip settings: toggle off/on and delay presets
description:
OpenSpec change: openspec/changes/app-tooltip-system/

Task 8.5: Verify tooltip settings work end-to-end: toggle enabled off → confirm no tooltips render; change delay preset → confirm responsiveness changes live.

Steps:
1. Open Settings → Tooltips section
2. Toggle off → hover any icon button → confirm no tooltip
3. Toggle on → hover → tooltip reappears
4. Set delay to 0ms → hover → immediate tooltip
5. Set delay to 1000ms → hover → tooltip delayed ~1s

Acceptance: All settings scenarios from spec pass.
Validation: Manual test with bun run dev
close_reason: Closed

title: Manual hover-test all migrated areas in dev server
description:
OpenSpec change: openspec/changes/app-tooltip-system/

Task 8.4: Start dev server (bun run dev) and manually hover-test each migrated area: layout shell, FilterBar, task-detail strip, changes browser, workspace tabs.

Test golden path for each area:
- Hover every icon button — tooltip appears after delay
- Tab to icon buttons — tooltip appears on focus
- Press Escape — tooltip dismisses

Acceptance: All areas show consistent tooltips; no regressions in click behavior.
Validation: Manual test (no automated command)
close_reason: Closed

title: Grep and remove all remaining bare title= attributes on interactive elements
description:
OpenSpec change: openspec/changes/app-tooltip-system/

Task 8.1: Grep for remaining bare title= attributes on <button> and <a> elements; remove or migrate any found.

Command: grep -r 'title="' src/components --include='*.tsx' -l

For each hit: determine if it's on an interactive element; if so, replace with <IconButton> or <Tooltip>; if it's on a non-interactive element (status dot, decorative), leave it.

Acceptance: No interactive element in src/ has a title= as its sole accessible name.
Validation: grep output shows zero button/a matches (only non-interactive elements)
close_reason: grep -rn 'title="' src --include='*.tsx' finds only DescriptionEditor.tsx:201 <div title='Unsaved changes' /> which is non-interactive (per design non-goal). Zero interactive elements have bare title= remaining.

title: Add Tooltips section to SettingsDialog
description:
OpenSpec change: openspec/changes/app-tooltip-system/

Task 2.3: Add 'Tooltips' section to src/components/settings/SettingsDialog.tsx — enable toggle + delay preset selector (0 / 250 / 500 / 1000 ms options).

Section follows the existing SectionHeader pattern used by Features, Appearance, Notifications.
- Toggle: enabled boolean, calls updateSettings({ tooltips: { ...tooltips, enabled: !enabled } })
- Delay selector: radio/select with preset values 0/250/500/1000 ms

Acceptance: Toggle turns tooltips on/off instantly; delay change takes effect on next hover; prefs persist across restart.
Validation: bun run dev → open Settings → verify Tooltips section visible and functional
close_reason: Added TooltipsSection to SettingsDialog with ToggleRow for enabled/disabled and a 4-preset delay selector (Instant/250ms/500ms/1s) matching the Density section pattern. Changes write through updateSettings({ tooltips: ... }). Typecheck passes.

title: Mount AppTooltipProvider in App.tsx
description:
OpenSpec change: openspec/changes/app-tooltip-system/

Task 2.2: Mount <AppTooltipProvider> in src/App.tsx between <SettingsProvider> and <TauriSyncProvider>.

Provider tree becomes:
  <SettingsProvider>
    <AppTooltipProvider>   ← new
      <TauriSyncProvider>
        ...

AppTooltipProvider reads useSettings().settings.tooltips and passes delayMs to Radix TooltipProvider.

Acceptance: All tooltips in the app respect the delayMs setting; changing settings updates delay without remount.
Validation: bun run typecheck && bun run dev (smoke test)
close_reason: Mounted AppTooltipProvider in App.tsx between SettingsProvider and TauriSyncProvider. Provider reads settings.tooltips from SettingsContext and passes delayDuration to Radix TooltipProvider. Typecheck passes.

title: Add TooltipPrefs to AppSettings and settingsStore
description:
OpenSpec change: openspec/changes/app-tooltip-system/

Task 2.1: Add TooltipPrefs interface and tooltips field to AppSettings in src/stores/settingsStore.ts; set defaults enabled: true, delayMs: 500; add deep-merge line in loadSettings().

Changes:
- export interface TooltipPrefs { enabled: boolean; delayMs: number }
- Add tooltips: TooltipPrefs to AppSettings
- Add tooltips: { enabled: true, delayMs: 500 } to DEFAULT_SETTINGS
- Add tooltips: { ...DEFAULT_SETTINGS.tooltips, ...raw.tooltips } to loadSettings merge

Acceptance: Old settings.json without tooltips key loads without error; defaults applied.
Validation: bun run typecheck
close_reason: Added TooltipPrefs interface (enabled: boolean, delayMs: number), tooltips field to AppSettings, defaults { enabled: true, delayMs: 500 } to DEFAULT_SETTINGS, and deep-merge line in loadSettings(). Old settings.json without tooltips key falls back to defaults via spread. Typecheck passes.

title: Create src/components/ui/Tooltip.tsx primitive
description:
OpenSpec change: openspec/changes/app-tooltip-system/

Task 1.2: Create src/components/ui/Tooltip.tsx — export AppTooltipProvider (reads useSettings().settings.tooltips, mounts Radix <TooltipProvider delayDuration={delayMs}>), TooltipConfigContext, and <Tooltip label shortcut? description?> wrapper that short-circuits when enabled=false.

Component must:
- Export AppTooltipProvider, TooltipConfigContext, and Tooltip
- Read useSettings() for delayMs and enabled
- When enabled=false, render only trigger children (no Radix portal)
- Support optional shortcut (rendered as <kbd>) and description (muted second line)
- Use Tailwind v4 tokens matching existing popover visual style

Acceptance: Tooltip renders with label, shortcut kbd, description; disabled state shows no popover.
Validation: openspec validate app-tooltip-system --type change && bun run typecheck
close_reason: Created src/components/ui/Tooltip.tsx: exports AppTooltipProvider (reads useSettings().settings.tooltips, mounts Radix TooltipProvider), TooltipConfigContext, and Tooltip component (label+shortcut+description, short-circuits when enabled=false). Typecheck passes.

title: Create src/components/ui/IconButton.tsx wrapper
description:
OpenSpec change: openspec/changes/app-tooltip-system/

Task 1.3: Create src/components/ui/IconButton.tsx — <button aria-label={label} ...rest> wrapped in <Tooltip>; required label: string, optional shortcut, description; forwards all HTMLButtonElement props.

API:
  interface IconButtonProps extends React.ButtonHTMLAttributes<HTMLButtonElement> {
    label: string        // required — tooltip text + aria-label
    shortcut?: string    // e.g. '⌘R'
    description?: string // optional second line
  }

Acceptance: TypeScript error if label omitted; aria-label equals label; tooltip shows on hover; disabled suppresses tooltip.
Validation: bun run typecheck
close_reason: Created src/components/ui/IconButton.tsx: forwardRef button with required label (aria-label + Tooltip text), optional shortcut/description, full HTMLButtonElement prop forwarding. Disabled state skips Tooltip wrapper. Typecheck passes.

title: Install @radix-ui/react-tooltip dependency

This is the first Radix package in the project. Required before any tooltip components can be created.

Acceptance: package.json lists @radix-ui/react-tooltip; bun install succeeds; no type errors.
Validation: openspec validate app-tooltip-system --type change
close_reason: Installed @radix-ui/react-tooltip@1.2.8 via bun add. Package listed in package.json and bun.lock. Typecheck passes.

title: OpenSpec: app-tooltip-system
description:
Execution tracker for openspec/changes/app-tooltip-system. Scope, requirements, and acceptance criteria live in OpenSpec. Beads tracks implementation status, dependencies, blockers, and ownership. Do not start implementation until bd ready shows work.

Change adds @radix-ui/react-tooltip, Tooltip + IconButton primitives in src/components/ui/, TooltipPrefs in AppSettings, AppTooltipProvider at app root, Tooltips section in SettingsDialog, and migration of all ~75 icon-only buttons across the full app.
close_reason: Closed

title: OpenSpec: app-refresh-settings
description: Execution tracker for openspec/changes/app-refresh-settings. Adds global Refresh action (TopBar button, Cmd/Ctrl+R, CommandPalette) and unified Settings dialog (feature toggles for OpenSpec/Ruflo, binary path overrides for bd/openspec/ruflo/dolt, actor identity, quick-capture shortcut, consolidated density/zoom/notification prefs). Artifacts: openspec/changes/app-refresh-settings/
close_reason: All 47 required Beads implementation issues closed. openspec validate passes. bun run typecheck clean. cargo test passes. Shipped: global Refresh action (TopBar button, Cmd/Ctrl+R, CommandPalette), unified Settings dialog (feature toggles for OpenSpec+Ruflo, binary path overrides for bd/openspec/ruflo/dolt, actor identity, quick-capture shortcut config, density/zoom/notification pref consolidation), localStorage migration, Rust AppSettings managed state with hot-reload.

title: 6.1 Implement guard() state machine
description:
OpenSpec: openspec/changes/dolt-server-self-recovery/ (spec: Health Probe + Orphan Detection + Safety Predicates; design.md §6 sequencing)

Task verbatim: Implement guard(project) -> Result<(), RecoveryError>:
  1. Run probe; if Ok, return.
  2. Enumerate + classify orphans.
  3. For each orphan, check safety predicates.
  4. If all safe, run kill sequence + respawn + return Ok.
  5. If any unsafe, emit dolt-recovery-required event and wait for attempt_dolt_recovery(force) Tauri command.

Acceptance: Each branch covered by an integration test; emits the event when escalating; never blocks longer than the probe deadline before deciding.
File: src-tauri/src/db/recovery.rs
close_reason: guard() state machine implemented in recovery/mod.rs; probes configured port, enumerates orphans, checks safety, auto-kills or escalates with dolt-recovery-required event; logs all transitions

title: OpenSpec: multi-tab-task-detail-workspace
description: Execution tracker for openspec/changes/multi-tab-task-detail-workspace. Scope, requirements, and acceptance criteria live in OpenSpec (proposal.md, design.md, specs/*.md). Beads tracks implementation status, dependencies, blockers, and ownership. Do not start implementation until 'bd ready' shows work. Validation: openspec validate multi-tab-task-detail-workspace.
close_reason: All 57 child issues closed. Workspace store (14 actions), paneTree helpers (5 pure functions), persistence, hash bridge, Tab/TabBar/TabContextMenu/LeafPane/SplitContainer/WorkspacePane, TaskList wiring, shortcuts (mod+w/shift+t/splits/tab nav), shortcut modal, dirty-tab registry. 31 unit tests pass. bun run build exits 0.

title: ErrorBoundary state persists across tab switches — reset on activeTab change
description: A single ErrorBoundary wrapping all three tabs keeps its error state when the user switches tabs. Fix: add key={activeTab} to the boundary wrapper so it remounts fresh per tab.
close_reason: Closed

title: Project switch hangs with Dolt pool timeout; clear activeProject before connect_project
description: switchProject awaits connect_project before clearing activeProject so React Query hooks continue firing against the old pool during the switch, causing connection contention. Pool has max_connections=5 and no acquire_timeout (sqlx default 30s). Fix: set activeProject=null before await, restore on failure; also set acquire_timeout=5s and max_connections=10 in DoltPool::connect.
close_reason: Closed

title: Deps tab renders blank white screen — ErrorBoundary + cytoscape stylesheet fix
description: No ErrorBoundary exists; any render error in DependencyGraphTab unmounts the entire React tree. App.css sets root bg to #f6f6f6 so blank state looks white. Cytoscape element inline styles are not valid in v3 (must use stylesheet selectors). Fix: add ErrorBoundary, fix App.css, move cytoscape styles to selectors, stabilize ReactFlow useNodesState init.
close_reason: Closed

title: Unblock specta+tauri-specta once stable release drops
description: Discovered while implementing openspec/changes/initial-app-scaffold BEADSPEC-ju6 (1.2). specta=2.0.0-rc.25 and tauri-specta=2.0.0-rc.25 fail to compile on stable Rust 1.90 due to use of nightly fmt::from_fn gate (debug_closure_helpers, tracking issue #117729). The feature was stabilized in Rust 1.87 but specta's RC crate uses the feature flag form which blocks stable. Deps commented out in Cargo.toml; IPC task (1.5 BEADSPEC-mtd) is blocked until this resolves. Resolution: monitor specta releases for a stable or RC that compiles on stable; re-add deps and implement tauri-specta codegen. Validation: cargo check passes with specta+tauri-specta in Cargo.toml.
close_reason: Resolved via vendor patch: specta rc.25 uses nightly fmt::from_fn (debug_closure_helpers, still unstable in Rust 1.90). Neither the published crate nor git main were fixed. Applied a local vendor patch in src-tauri/vendor/specta/ replacing fmt::from_fn with an equivalent local DebugValue wrapper struct. Also patched specta-serde to fix a borrow lifetime regression under Rust edition 2024. Both patches routed via [patch.crates-io] in Cargo.toml. BEADSPEC-mtd (1.5) now unblocked and completed.
